textPlain: Nice, I'd love to see this added to the llm-reasoners project [0]. They've got a nice set of reasoning techniques implemented from papers.[0] https://github.com/maitrix-org/llm-reasoners

Very cool I'm going to try and play with this later. It looks like llm-consortium [0] but with some nice new features, like confidence gating and pluggable verifiers. 
So, if a response confidence is below a threshold it is eliminated entirely? Is that the gating?[0] https://x.com/karpathy/status/1870692546969735361
well, that helped understand better. It was a bit dry with just the ref paper. I like the visuals btw.
